__WARNING__: DO NOT commit this file with real credentials to version control. Only templates/notification-config.json (this template) should be committed. Copy this to your project root and fill in values there.
__SECURITY_NOTES__: 1. The root notification-config.json is gitignored — only this template is safe to commit.
2. Prefer environment variables over hardcoded values: SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL, TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL, DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASS.
3. Rotate webhook URLs periodically and immediately if they are exposed in logs or commits.
4. For CI/CD: use pipeline secrets (GitHub Secrets, GitLab CI Variables) instead of this config file.
5. Use app-specific passwords for SMTP auth (e.g., Gmail App Passwords), never your primary account password.

slack.__WARNING__: Set SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL env var instead of hardcoding the URL here. Never commit real webhook URLs.

teams.__WARNING__: Set TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL env var instead of hardcoding the URL here. Never commit real webhook URLs.

discord.__WARNING__: Set DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL env var instead of hardcoding the URL here. Never commit real webhook URLs.

email.__WARNING__: Set SMTP_USER and SMTP_PASS env vars instead of hardcoding credentials here. Use app-specific passwords, never your primary account password.
